prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Upon repeated daily trials, the experience of waking up consistently underwhelms. The manufacturer promises refreshment and renewal, yet delivery varies wildly from the advertised experience. Initial boot-up time is excessive, with the interface responding sluggishly to basic commands. Occasional glitches include dry mouth, inexplicable bodily discomfort, and memory lapses regarding important nighttime notifications. While the "snooze" feature offers temporary relief, it ultimately compounds user dissatisfaction. Customer service (consciousness) improves after application of third-party solutions (coffee), but this represents an additional expense not disclosed in the original agreement. Would consider alternative providers if available; unfortunately, the subscription appears to be automatic and non-cancelable. Two stars solely because the alternative seems permanently unavailable.
